localizationDictionary.texts:
Auto admit Attendee admission settings Your request to speak was declined. Your request to speak was granted. A user has requested to speak. Request to speak Upload audio Upload document URL Use URL Background color Waiting for the host to admit you to the event. Waiting for the host to start the event. Welcome to the Lobby No one found Minutes Registered Time(s) per day Repeat every Invite by Email Invite users Invite presenter Your event is not available at the moment. You have rejected our invitation to join the event. We sent you a secondary email containing a link to the event. Check your spam/junk folder if the email is not found. Thank you for accepting the event! {0} rejected your invitation to join the {1} event. {0} accepted your invitation to join the {1} event. Event invitation accepted. You've already rejected this invitation. Please contact the event host to invite you to the event. You've already accepted this invitation. Please check your email for the invitation link. Check your spam/junk folder if the email is not found. It looks like your invitation has expired. Please contact the event host for more information. {0} invited you to join the {1} event. You are invited to an event! Keep playing Stop video Unshare video Stop the video and come back to live event? Whiteboard Share video Share slides Share screen Edit event Are you sure you want to purchase this event? No related event Start Event End Event Go live Join View recording Upcoming Welcome Join room Test Play Connectivity Output Audio Remove No presenter found No users found Enable offers tab""n Interactive tools Message all Not joined Waiting room Audience Disable all presenting Disable all camera Disable all mic Disable presenting Disable camera Disable mic Guests Stop all presenting Turn off all cameras Mute Co-hosts Band attendee Stop presenting Turn off camera Mute all Me Admit all Hosts Speak requests Registrants Live No Events found Visit Topics Add Reaction Are you sure you want to delete this post in the forum? Post Forum Forums No questions found Response Upvote Responses Presenters Invite Co-Host Host Guest YOUR DEFAULT ROLE Enable Microphone Enable Webcam Enable Presentation tools Enable Speak requests View Audience Chat Chat publicly Tag members Chat privately With anyone With admin only Ask questions Allow audience to upvote Allow audience to respond Private questions with admins Allow follow up response Enable polls tab Display number of purchases Enable handouts tabs View registrants Manage guests Are you sure you want to delete this poll? Add question Choose a question A question allowing multiple answers A question allowing only one answer Share results with attendees? Select maximum Select minimum Number of responses Add option Add offer Edit offer Launch offer Re-launch offer End offer Option Type your question here Multiple choice Multiple response Name your poll Poll Display at registration Created on Question Queue Are you sure you want to delete this resource? No items found Uploaded on Upload handout Upload slides You can upload {0} files. Upload video to play during your event Upload slides to present during your event Slides What would you like to upload? Presentation materials Manage guest settings Manage audience Manage audience settings Allow co-hosts to upvote Allow co-hosts to respond Allow guests to upvote Allow guests to respond Create polls Create offers Upload handouts Are you sure you want to purchase this video series? Are you sure you want to purchase this video? The video series was successfully purchased. The video was successfully purchased. Please buy this video first in order to view it. Buy this Video You unfollowed this user. You are now following this user. Unfollow Offers Handouts Unsaved successfully Reads Add a Response Ask a Question Unsave Like No article found Questions Purchase More in series Preview series No related video Related Follow Share Purchased Saved Student progress At Open Closed Enrollment closed, no longer accepting attendees Enrollment open and accepting attendees Event access Event visibility Replay follow up 15 minute reminder 1 hour reminder 24 hour reminder Registration email Custom webinar URL Enable chat tab Attendees can respond Attendees can upvote Public questions Private questions Enable questions tab Don't record event Record event and make replay available in store Event replay Duration (in minutes) Event time Event date Recurring times Single date and time Frequency Date and time Add event Event series thumbnail Event thumbnail Write your event series name here Write your event name here Event series name Event name Event preview Are you sure you want to unpublish this event? The status will change to Draft. Are you sure you want to publish this event? Next event in Days Starts in Attendees Are you sure you want to delete this event? Create event Name your event series Name your event Build a collection of events Event series Create a one off event Single event New event Successfully submitted! Write your reply Write your comment Load more replies Are you sure you want to delete this article? Are you sure you want to delete this video? You are starting from scratch Events Replies Reply Available immediately Immediate No video found No comments found Checked offer Checked offer Downloaded handout Activated poll Engagement Conversion Plays vs visits Traffic Upsell Plays Purchases Visits Edit article Edit video Are you sure you want to unpublish this video? The status will change to Draft. Are you sure you want to publish this video? Preview video Video available on Days from last video Video delayed Last video Are you sure you want to unpublish this article? The status will change to Draft. Are you sure you want to publish this article? Article preview Article available on Specific date Days from last article Article delayed Last article Article series visibility Write your article series name here Article series name Article series thumbnail Article thumbnail Add article Create article Layout Edit custom layout Create custom layout Add custom margin Landing page Write your description here Write your course name here Apply to all lessons in this course Make this lesson a prerequisite Prerequisites Make this lesson a free preview Store preview Lesson visibility Unavailable on both your profile and in the store Invisible Available on your profile and in the store Previous comments remain visible but prevents new ones being posted Locked Hides all comments and prevents new ones being posted Hidden comments need approving by administrator Comment moderation All comments are visible and new ones can be posted Visible Delay lesson Section available on From specific date Days from course start date From course start date Days from enrollment date Section delayed From enrollment date Article visibility Approximate lesson duration Write your course section name here Press enter to add more Article name Write your article name here Article New article Name your article series Name your article Build a collection of articles Article series Create a one off article Single article Articles Allow access to content free of charge Fixed fee Charge students a one time fee to access content Payment plan Split the total course price over several payments Subscription Charge student a reoccurring monthly fee to access content Video name Write your video name here Write your subtitle here Categories and tags Video thumbnail hides all comments and prevents new ones being posted previous comments remain visible but prevents new ones being posted Custom URL Video visibility Unavailable on both your profile and in store Available on your profile and in the store Add video Name your video series Successfully removed Successfully uploaded The video duration must not exceed {0}. Upload a video by adding your file to the left Upload your video Upload video Saves Shares Likes Views Video Create video Name your video Choose a template Build a collection of videos Video series Create a one off video Single video New video My learning My teaching Videos No recent graduate Upload image Select a Component New component New page Page Pages Write a review Graduates You have successfully completed this course. Well done! Value of money Your ratings and review was successfully submitted Tell us about your experience of To what extent was the content To what extent did you rececive To what extent was the course Please rate the course based on its Please rate the instructors And Your experience Accurate Interactive Engaging Design Structure Support Overall, how was Write a review for Date uploaded Course progress Enrolled Uploaded by Upload assignment Allow upload Past Current Progress Enrolled on Reaction removed Successfully reacted Successfully posted Resources Assignments Messages Start course Start article Exit Buy now Student portal Last year comparison Completed Students Revenue This year This month This week Published Click here to choose color Add page {0} invited you to the {1} project. Invatation sent Academically - Project Invitation

Hi {0},

You have been invited by {1} to the {2} project.

To make your offer for the project, please click this link: Project Offer Link


If for some reason the link is not clickable, please copy and paste the url below to your browser:

{3}

Invite to quote Rating State Unread Read Manage your notifications View all You All information in this form (including files) will be viewable by tutors Caution Only tutors you invite to quote will be available to view your request Private request Drag and drop any files that would help tutors understand your needs (more files can be added later) Upload files (Optional) Add keywords to help us match you with the right tutor Subject keywords No recent notification {0} rescheduled a session called {1} for the {2} project. {0} booked a session called {1} for the {2} project. No content selected Configure this component on the left panel Name your new unit Add unit Text Choose your component Lesson preview Add section Add component Create your lesson by adding a new page Create your lesson by adding a component below Create your lesson No content yet Authors Content Page builder Name your new module Show me as busy Personal event Publish Draft View Name your new lesson Paying Tutor name Next session Completion Add Session Edit Session Tutor Home Name your new course Allow access to content free of charge Language Pricing Charge a fee Course Image Course Name / Details Choose a course template Blank Choose a lesson template Add module Add lesson Start by adding a lesson or a module No lessons or modules Select a Group No Conversation Select a Project Conversations Loading Create course No previous conversation Attach file Add photo Type your message here You are not allowed to share your screen. Please ask your tutor to grant you access. Are you sure you want to permanently delete this project? Schedules Available Okay Your session has ended. Admit Meeting Started {0} will admit you soon {0} is now in the lobby Waiting for {0} to start the meeting Waiting for {0} to join This email address is already in use. The email you are trying to use is already associated with a registered user. Please use a different email address and try again. Invalid email address {0} is not available from {1} to {2}. A conflict on the user's schedule was detected for {3} event with the schedule of {4} to {5}. Please update the time of your booking and try again. Booking failed Reason for declining Should the student accept the new time, would they’d like the current timeslot opened back up? Academically - Booking Cancelled for {0} Event

Hi {0},

You cancelled the {2} event for {3} project. We already informed {1} about your cancellation.

Cancellation Notes: {4}

Academically - Booking Cancelled for {0} Event

Hi {0},

Your {2} event for {3} project was cancelled by {1}.

Are you sure you want to cancel your confirmed booking? This cancellation cannot be undone. Topic Cancel session Your suggestion for a new qualification has been submitted and will undergo a review process by our administrators. Suggest a qualification Select qualification Qualification Select academic level Loading sessions No past sessions No upcoming sessions Past Sessions You did not enter the required confirmation text for deleting your account. Please double check your entry and try again. Delete My Account You have successfully deleted your account. Thank you for using Academically. Are you sure you want to delete your account? Once deleted, you will not be able to retrieve your account or history. Please type CONFIRM to delete your account. Status Tutor Upload your introductory video. Click or drag a file here. Introductory Video From University Approve or reject applications Tutor Applications Tutor Applications List Academically - Booking Confirmed Academically - New Booking Request The booking request was cancelled. The booking request was declined. The booking request was rescheduled. The booking request was accepted. The booking request was created. There was no offer made by {0} for {1}. Please select a tutor that has submitted an offer for this project. Booking Failed Decline End time Start time No Reschedule History Booking Details Reschedule History Submit Saving... Propose new time Accept Book session Select Project Project Duration Edit Booking Add Booking Bookings Booking Understanding the type of work you're looking for helps us ask all the right questions. Next, tell us what level you're working at Understanding the type of work you're looking for helps us ask all the right questions. Next, tell us what level you're working at Understanding the type of services you're looking for help us ask all the right questions. Let's start with the Basics Of Step Block Outs Your time zone was successfully updated. Yearly Monthly Weekly Daily One Time Recurrence Edit block out Add block out Schedule Manage your events Calendar Link copied to clipboard I agree to the terms & conditions I agree to the privacy policy Create a New Project Use the wizard to find academic support You are a student who's aced their course, a sold professional tutor or academic. You are a student who's aced their course, a sold professional tutor. You are a student who's aced their coursea sold professional tutor Request Support How it works Popular Services Disable Enable Institution Evidence Edit course Courses Course title Course

A student named {0} has completed his application to become a tutor.

Academically - Tutor Application by {0}

You have completed your tutor application process.

Your application will now undergo our verification process.

We will send you an email once your application has been approved, rejected or if we have follow up questions regarding some of the information you provided.

Thank you for choosing our platform.

Academically - Tutor Application Completed I understand that payment is made to me [X] days after a session has ended and that payment may be withheld should a student raise a complaint against me. I understand that ScholarPro is not responsible for any claims brought against me by another party as a result of misconduct. I agree to allow ScholarPro to randomly audit sessions and messages to ensure compliance with their acceptable use policy. I understand that my ratings effect my ranking in the ScholarPro search results. I understand that a session must be confirmed by both parties before it can go ahead. I agree not to include any personal contact information, hyperlinks or branding on my profile as to direct students away from the ScholarPro platform. I understand that I am solely responsible for paying tax owed on money I earned through the ScholarPro platform. I agree never to take payment directly from a student and understand that all payments must go through ScholarPro payment gateway. I agree that if I need to cancel or rearrange a session, I must do so via the ScholarPro booking system. I agree that all sessions must be booked and delivered via the ScholarPro platform. Please click all of the checkboxes below to confirm that you agree to all of the declarations. Complete Application I have agreed to the DBS update service and I give Academically consent to perform a status check. In order to be able to serve under 18’s then you must provide a valid DBS or equivalent certificate. Date of Issue DBS Number Select Relationship Professional Academic Edit Reference Add Reference Relationship Forename Good Evening Good Afternoon Good Morning Your phone number was already verified perviously. You will be asked to verify your new phone number again and your previously verified phone number will be removed from our network. Are you sure you want to continue? Select Expertise Level Expert Intermediate Entry Level Expertise Level You are applying to become a tutor. You will be asked both your personal and professional information. Are you sure you want to continue? Connect Stripe Even when you set your profile to public, you need to connect your account to stripe in order for others to be able to search you on the Academically network. Stripe connection required You were successfully onboarded to stripe! You will be onboarded to stripe. Are you sure you want to continue? Select Language Average Rating Language Spoken Basic Conversational Fluent Native Or Bilingual Languages What is your English proficiency? What other language do you speak? Add Language Edit Language No Language Set Professional overview Are you sure you want to leave the tutor wizard? You can still continue your becoming a tutor process later. Please save your changes before leaving this page. Declaration Privacy policy Terms of Use DBS Check References Contact Number Address Photo ID Profile Picture Services Offered About You Tutor Wizard Browse Gallery Cover Photo Gallery The subject you are trying to suggest already exists. No Subject Suggested

You have submitted a subject suggestion with the following details:


Subject Name: {0}

Service: {1}


We regret to inform you that your suggestion was rejected by our Administrators. Please review the details of your submission then try suggesting the subject again.

You have submitted a subject suggestion with the following details:


Subject Name: {0}

Service: {1}


We are happy to inform you that your suggestion was accepted by our Administrators. The subject will now be available on all users across Academically.

Academically - Service Subject Suggestion Reviewed If your desired subject is not available, you can suggest a new subject by clicking the Suggest button. Suggest Suggest a subject The subject suggestion was submitted. It will now undergo our verification process. We will notify you by email once your suggestion was accepted or rejected. The suggested subject was rejected. The suggested subject was approved and will be visible to all users. Date Requested Requested By Subject Name Subjects Approve or Reject Suggestions Approve or Reject Suggestions Reject Approve Suggestions Service Subjects

A request to add a new Service Subject was created.

The details of the request are:


Subject Name: {0}

Level: {1}

Requested By: {2}


To review this suggestion, make sure you are currently logged in on Acamidemically as an Admin or Super Admin and click this link: Review Suggested Subject


If for some reason the link is not clickable, please copy and paste the url below to your browser:

{3}

Academically - Service Subject Suggestion Suggest Subject

  • Minimum of 8 character
  • Maximum of 32 character
  • At least one uppercase letter
  • At least one lowercase letter
  • At least one number
  • At least one special character
To create a new password, you have to meet all of the following requirements: Password requirements Enter your previous and new password Change your password Password changed successfully Two Factor Security using Authenticator App is enabled. If you have a new device or need to reset please disable then re-enable Two Factor Security. Follow the following steps to set up your authenticator: Authenticator app Two-factor authentication adds an additional layer of security to your account by requiring more than just a password to log in. Two factor security This will disable the Two Factor Security on your account. Are you sure you want to proceed? Two factor authentication is now disabled. Two factor authentication is now enabled. Verify Verification Code is not recognised. Please try again. Making your tutor profile visible means that you are available to accept work will appear in search results. Tutor profile You are currently invisible Making your student profile visible means that Tutors will be able to view your profile. Please upload a new passport photo. Pending Verification Your passport was successfully uploaded. It will be subjected to our verification process. We will let you know once it has been approved or declined. Loading image cropper Add Qualification Edit Qualification Close Qualification Documents Qualifications Upload Evidence of Qualification Attained Grade Attained Conferring Organization Professional Certificate Or Award Add course Other Courses Drop file or click here to upload Metrics User Type Academic level The percentage of positive reviews is calculated using the formula:
Positives / (Positives + Negatives) Knowledge Professionalism Punctuality Value for money Communication Positive reviews No Reviews Found Negative Neutral Positive Select Education Level Grade Education Level Edit Level Add Level Edit Education Add Education No Records Found Formal Education Resending Resend Sending Send Enter Verification Code Your phone number was successfully verified. The verification code you entered is invalid. Please enter the code sent to your phone number or you can request to send a new one. Verification Failed Your Academically Registration Code is: {0} The verification code was sent to your phone number. Phone Number Verification Phone number Remove Photo Upload Photo Removing Edit Cover Photo Cropping Crop Image Saving Phone Email Industry Experience Research Introduction Offline Total Projects Total Hours Recent Activity Usage My Projects Blog Overseas Study Upcoming Sessions Confirm Upcoming Sessions Assignment Structure Academic Writing Research Skills Presentation Skills Support Level Tabs Projects No time zone configured Select Time Zone Academically - Tutorial Access Granted

Hello {0},

You have authorized student {1} and Tutorial request access has been granted

Kind regards,

Academically

Academically - Tutorial Access Granted

Hello {0},

You have been authorized by your guardian {1} and Tutorial request access has been granted

Kind regards,

Academically

This email is invalid Student must be authorized by their parent/guardian befor submitting offer Tutorial request has been granted Academically - Guardian Consent

Hi {0},

We’ve recently received a request from {1} to use our Academic Support Services.

Because of {1}'s age we require authorisation from a parent or guardian before they can interact with another user on the site.

If you are happy for {1} to use our services, please kindly click on the following link to grant them access.

LINK HERE

Kind regards,

Academically

We will send an email to your parents/guardian once this is confirmed you will have full access to the site Guardian Details You must get authorisation from your parent or guardian before using this service Unable to suggest a new item under this Area of Study. Terms and Conditions Add Inactive Active Drop or click to upload State/Province Zip/Postcode City Address line 2 Address line 1 Select Country Date of birth Become a Tutor Privacy & Notifications Service Areas of Study Education Details Manage your settings Profile Profile link Recent Project (Providing Help) Recent Project (Receiving Help) Message Hub Recent Projects Verifications Polls Profile Summary Widgets Edit Publication Create Publication Country Degree Start year End year Level Publication Keywords Publications University/College Publication Certificate or Award Publisher Summary Create User Publication Update User Publication Delete User Publication Certificate Organization Financials User Management Navigations Delete role Update role Create role Delete user Update user Create user Academic Support Peer Support Study Skills Proposals Tutorial What do you need to help with? This will be used to match you with the most suitable tutor What level of support do you require? What is the works methodology What are the main topic areas or keywords? We have detected the following skills to suit your project. Feel Free to modify these choices to best suit your needs What are your main concerns or questions you'd like addressed? You tutor will use this to assess whether they can help you Urgency Level? When is your deadline? Native Language Min Education Level Min Rating Distance Best match Feedback Proofreading Contacts Availability Last Seen SortBy Last login time Security Enable 2FA Two Factor Authentication To use an authenticator app go through the following steps: 2FA is enabled, uncheck to disable, if you have a new device or need to reset then uncheck and recheck the checkbox. {0}

Academically - Complete your Registration A registration completion link has been sent to your email account, please check your junk/spam folders. Enter your password Home page About Welcome to Academically! Form is not valid. Please check and fix errors. Tenant name can not be empty Invalid username or password There is no tenant defined with name {0} Tenant {0} is not active. User {0} is not active and can not log in. Please contact our support {1}. Your email address is not confirmed. You can not login. The user account has been locked out. Please try again later. Please enter login information Tenancy name Username or email Password Reset Password Update Password Remember me Log in Login failed! Name surname Username Name Surname Email address Tenants Saved successfully Create new tenant Admin email address Admin password Save Cancel Tenant name must be at least 2 chars, starts with a letter and continue with letter, number, dash or underscore. Default password is {0} Can be empty to login as host. Register Or login with Your account is waiting to be activated by system admin. Tenant Selection Please select one of the following tenants. Logout Please don't enter an email address for username. Database connection string Users Is active Full name Create new user Yes No Optional Leave empty to switch to the host Current tenant Not selected Change Change tenant Multi Level Menu Back Successfully registered Your email address should be activated Roles Display Name Recommended Tutor Settings Edit Delete Create new role Role Name Actions Could not complete login operation. Please try again later. Could not validate external user Edit role Edit tenant Edit user TenantId {0} is not active Unknown tenantId {0} This field is required Please wait... Successfully deleted Start Typing Skins Settings Filter Current password New password Confirm new password Enter your new password Enter confirm password Passwords do not match Passwords must be at least 8 characters, contain a lowercase, uppercase, and number User {0} will be deleted. Role {0} will be deleted and unassigned from all assigned users. Tenant {0} will be deleted. Search... Please enter at least {0} characters Please enter no more than {0} characters Invalid email address Invalid Do not match All Total: {0} Search Clear 1. Enter your administrator password 2. Copy this random password so you can send it to the user This Weeks Income Delete your account Don't need ScholarPro anymore? Service Wizard Create Project Project name Continue Browse Browse Projects Find Work Usage & Financials Shortlisted All Projects Min Edu. Level See All Projects Shortlist View Brief Service type Full details Project Details Make an offer Offer Confirm Offer History My Offer Price per hour Number of hours Total price Free 15 minutes interview (recommended) Offer a free 15 minute interview to allow students to ask questions and help them decide if you meet their requirements. Offer sent successfully Academically - Project Offer Chat history Poll results

Hi {0},


You have received an offer for {1}

Please click this link to view the offer details: Offer details link


If for some reason the link is not clickable, please copy and paste the url below to your browser:


{2}

Tutors found All proposals Sort Written feedback Live session 5 Session Message View offer Project brief Browse tutors Hired Date created Proposal already sent Tutor interview (15 mins) Total Pay hr hrs Payment methods By accepting a session, under our terms and coditions, you are obliged to attend it unless you rearrange it at least 24 hours before the session is due to start, otherwise its non-refundable. Please indicate that you accept our terms and conditions by toggling the switch to the right.
